title: trichomanes punctatum subsp. floridanum
intro: Trichomanes punctatum subsp. floridanum, also known as Florida lip fern, is a species of fern native to the southeastern United States. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Trichomanes punctatum subsp. floridanum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support respiratory health and relieve coughs.
